nta.declaration: clock cl_local, cl_global; int temp; const int a = 2011; const int b = 2028; const int c = 2047; const int d = 2066; const int e = 2086; const int f = 2105; const int g = 2124; const int h = 2143; const int i = 2166; const int j = 2189; const int k = 2208; const int l = 2231; const int m = 2255; const int n = 2274; const int o = 2293; const int p = 2345;
